svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/27.0.5 Chrome/134.0.6998.205 Electron/35.3.0 Safari/537.36" scale="1" border="0" version="27.0.5"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="VjV0lmNgZ6dH0YjW8Iet"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="849" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-19" value="PHYSICAL STIMULUS
V / A / Ω" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="10" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-20" value="DIGITAL MULTIMETER
A/D conversion &
Serial transmission" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="110" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-22" value="LABVIEW ENGINE
Scaling & Validation" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="210" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-23" value="TOLERANCE CHECK
Compare with Tolerances" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="310" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-25" value="POSTGRESQL
Store & Save &
Traceable Record" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;strokeWidth=2;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="410" width="140" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-26" value="BUTTON IN LABVIEW
User presses manually" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="410" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-27" value="PYTHON SUBPROCESS
Data Synthesis" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="510" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-28" value="REPORTLAB 
Rendering" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="610" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-29" value="PDF CERTIFICATE
Massive Final Report" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="710" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-30" value="Measurement" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-19" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-20" edge="1"> <mxGeometry x="-0.3571" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="41" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="294" y="41" as="targetPoint" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-32" value="Raw ASCII String" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-20" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-22" edge="1"> <mxGeometry x="-0.3889" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="672.5000000000002" y="68.00000000000011" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-33" value="Compare" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-22" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-23" edge="1"> <mxGeometry x="-0.1429" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-34" value="SQL Insert" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-23" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-25" edge="1"> <mxGeometry x="0.0008" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="127" y="702" as="targetPoint" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-36" value="SQL Select
" style="curved=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=2 3;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-25" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-27" edge="1"> <mxGeometry x="-0.0837" y="18" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="90" y="550" /> </Array> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-37" value="Manual trigger" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=0.99;rounded=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-26" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-27" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="355" y="550" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-38" value="Massive data synthesis" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-27" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-28" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-39" value="Render massive PDF" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;" parent="1" source="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-28" target="1AxLdwjZnQMsM9YsodE6-29" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
